description: Designed for men of all ages who are seeking a fashionable, affordable, casual watch that will stay in style for many seasons. The timex collection is the ideal accessory for a sophisticated, casual look.Case diameter: 38 mmCase thickness: 4 mmDial shape: RoundWarranty: One yearStainless steel round caseBlack genuine leather strap with a tang claspWhite dial with metallic handsBranding on the dialScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistance upto 30 metres, allowing you to use it even when showering
